code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next_color(_ color: Color) -> Color
  match color
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn color_name(_ color: Color) -> String
  match color
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut current = Color.Red
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  match line_opt
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    for token in tokens
      if token == "next"
        current = next_color(current)
      end
    end
  when None
  end
  println(color_name(current))
end
